data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to the specific requirement of time segment allocation rows linking clock events to staffing assignments. The linked use case mentions this requirement but does not provide concrete evidence that it is satisfied. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement, as the exploratory step instruction explicitly calls for validation of this aspect.
gaps: No evidence confirming time segment allocation rows linking clock events to staffing assignments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
